name: Outlier Remover
shortDescription: Remove rows with outlier values from the dataset
description: Detects and removes outlier rows using IQR (simple percentile-based), Z-Score, or Isolation Forest (ML-based). Useful for cleaning data before analysis or visualization in Superset.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

method.label: Detection Method
method.description: IQR: removes rows outside 1.5x interquartile range. Z-Score: removes rows more than N standard deviations from mean. Isolation Forest: ML-based, good for multi-column outliers.

columns.label: Columns to Check
columns.description: Comma-separated numeric column names to check for outliers. Leave blank to use all numeric columns.

threshold.label: Threshold
threshold.description: IQR: multiplier (default 1.5). Z-Score: max std deviations (default 3). Isolation Forest: contamination 0.0-0.5 (default 0.05).

outputDescription: Cleaned dataset with outlier rows removed
